stops.extraction_target: Compute: digital_root(4463900 + 64 + 421)

bridge.expression_code:
def digital_root(n):
    n = abs(int(n))
    return n if n == 0 else ((n - 1) % 9) + 1
result = digital_root(4463900 + 64 + 421)
print(result)

stops.reasoning: Compute stop: digital_root(4463900 + 64 + 421) = 7
